title: Click on a panel in kanban to show issue details

phases.title: Expose single issue fetch as Tauri command
phases.description: Make fetch_github_issue_by_number a public Tauri command so the frontend can fetch a single issue by number. Register it in lib.rs invoke_handler.
phases.verification: cargo check passes in src-tauri directory.

phases.title: Fetch and display issue details when clicking completed kanban cards
phases.description: In App.tsx, when selectedIssue is set but not found in the issues store, call the new fetch_github_issue_by_number command to get the full issue data. Store it locally so the detail panel can render it. This covers completed/closed issues that aren't in the main issues array.
phases.verification: pnpm typecheck passes. Clicking a completed kanban card should show issue details in the right panel.
